overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing a female character exploring the Louvre Museum courtyard in Paris. The character walks through the historic plaza featuring the glass pyramid, classical stone palace architecture, outdoor sculptures, and formal gardens under bright sunny skies.

scene_state.functional_zone: historic palace courtyard with glass pyramid

agents.ego_description: walking around the pyramid courtyard, circling the glass pyramid structure

entered.detail: large glass and metal pyramid structure reflecting sunlight
historic palace facade with columns, ornate windows, and stone construction
wide stone tile plaza surrounding the pyramid

segments.scene_description: The character walks through the iconic Louvre courtyard with the glass pyramid prominently visible. The classical stone palace walls rise on either side of the expansive paved plaza under a bright blue sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza with view of triumphal arch

events.description: moving from pyramid area into open plaza with view of distant triumphal arch
large abstract stone sculptures begin appearing scattered on the plaza ground

agents.ego_description: walking across the open plaza toward the distant Arc de Triomphe du Carrousel

entered.detail: triumphal arch monument visible in the eastern distance
abstract stone monuments and modern sculptures placed on the ground

segments.scene_description: The character crosses the vast open plaza moving away from the pyramid toward the eastern arch. Stone sculptures begin to appear on the paved ground as the palace building shifts to the right side of the frame.

events.description: stepping from paved plaza onto the grass lawn of the sculpture garden
navigating among large stone sculptures scattered across the grass

agents.ego_description: walking through the sculpture garden, navigating around stone monuments on the grass

entered.detail: well-maintained green grass with small white flowers
trimmed boxwood hedges lining the garden perimeter

segments.scene_description: The character transitions from stone pavement to a grassy sculpture garden. Various abstract stone sculptures are scattered across the lawn, with formal hedges and the palace building visible in the background.

events.description: tall obelisk monument with statue comes into view ahead
transitioning from grass back to paved stone path near the building

agents.ego_description: walking toward the obelisk monument and the palace building wing

entered.detail: tall stone obelisk with statue on top situated in the courtyard
stone pathway leading toward the building entrance

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a tall obelisk monument while transitioning back to paved ground. The stone sculptures recede into the background left as the character moves toward the palace building wing on the right.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through the Louvre courtyard, transitioning from the iconic glass pyramid toward the museum's formal sculpture gardens and palace wings. It begins with the character walking across the expansive paved plaza under a bright blue sky, with the pyramid and classical stone walls framing the scene. As the character moves away from the pyramid toward the eastern arch, the palace shifts to the right and stone sculptures begin to emerge along the path. The scene then transitions from the stone pavement onto a grassy lawn scattered with abstract sculptures and formal hedges before turning back toward the paved ground. Finally, the camera approaches a tall obelisk monument as the sculptures recede into the background and the character moves closer to the palace building wing on the right.
